accordion.name: accordion
accordion.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content.

alert.name: alert
alert.description: Displays a callout for important information with variant styles (info, success, warning, danger).

avatar.name: avatar
avatar.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

badge.name: badge
badge.description: Displays a small status descriptor with variant styles.

breadcrumb.name: breadcrumb
breadcrumb.description: Displays the path to the current page using a hierarchy of links.

button.name: button
button.description: A clickable button with multiple variants and sizes.

card.name: card
card.description: A container with a border and shadow used to group content.

checkbox.name: checkbox
checkbox.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

dropdown.name: dropdown
dropdown.description: A menu that appears on trigger click with a list of actions.

input.name: input
input.description: A text input field with variant styles and icon support.

modal.name: modal
modal.description: A dialog overlay that requires user interaction before returning to the page.

popover.name: popover
popover.description: A floating panel anchored to a trigger element.

progress.name: progress
progress.description: A horizontal bar indicating progress or completion percentage.

radio.name: radio
radio.description: A set of mutually exclusive options presented as a group.

separator.name: separator
separator.description: A visual divider between sections of content.

sheet.name: sheet
sheet.description: A panel that slides in from any edge of the screen.

skeleton.name: skeleton
skeleton.description: A placeholder animation shown while content is loading.

slider.name: slider
slider.description: A draggable input for selecting a numeric value within a range.

table.name: table
table.description: A data table with sortable column headers.

tabs.name: tabs
tabs.description: A set of layered sections of content that display one panel at a time.

toast.name: toast
toast.description: A temporary notification that appears at the edge of the screen.

toggle.name: toggle
toggle.description: A switch control that toggles between on and off states.

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: A small popup that shows additional information on hover.
